summary: Iteration 107: Sidebar Flyout Submenu Feature - All 9 features verified working correctly. Flyout opens to the RIGHT of sidebar, bottom items use upward positioning, navigation works, active route highlighting works.

minor.issue: Returns 422 - Ratings API not available (pre-existing, not related to flyout feature)

issues: Console warnings about chart width/height being -1 - pre-existing issue, not related to flyout feature

critical_code_review_comments: Layout.jsx lines 348-388: Flyout state management with activeSubmenu, flyoutStyle, submenuButtonRefs - well implemented
openFlyout() uses getBoundingClientRect() to determine if item is near bottom of viewport (line 377-386)
Bottom items get bottom-aligned positioning: setFlyoutStyle({ bottom: `${viewportH - rect.bottom}px`, top: 'auto', left: '288px' })
renderFlyout() renders fixed position panel with z-index 60, proper header with parent icon/name
Click outside detection uses data-submenu-flyout and data-submenu-trigger attributes
Route change closes flyout via useEffect on location.pathname (line 365-367)
Active route child highlighted with bg-[#4D96FF]/20 text-white classes
context_for_next_testing_agent: Sidebar flyout submenu feature fully verified. All dropdown items (Dashboards, Services, Service Management, Transactions, Admin Config, System) open flyout panels to the RIGHT of the sidebar. Bottom items (Admin Config, System) use upward positioning with bottom CSS property. Flyout has z-index 60, closes on click outside, closes on route change, only one flyout open at a time.

flyout_opens_to_right.details: Flyout positioned at left: 288px (to the right of 288px wide sidebar). Services flyout button at x=12, flyout at x=288.

flyout_panel_with_submenu_items.details: Clicking Services shows flyout with: Browse Services, Hotels, Restaurants, Travel, Car Rental, Events, Packages, Laundry, Cinema

bottom_items_upward_positioning.details: System flyout uses style='bottom: 183px; top: auto; left: 288px;' - opens upward to stay within viewport

submenu_navigation.details: Clicking Hotels in Services flyout navigates to /services/hotels correctly

click_outside_closes_flyout.details: Clicking on main content area closes the flyout

only_one_flyout_at_a_time.details: Clicking Dashboards while Services flyout is open closes Services and opens Dashboards

active_route_highlighted.details: Hotels link has classes 'bg-[#4D96FF]/20 text-white' when on /services/hotels page

flyout_header_with_parent_name.details: Flyout has header showing parent item name (Services, Admin Config, System) with icon

flyout_z_index.details: Flyout has z-index: 60, renders above main content

toggle_flyout.details: Clicking same trigger button closes the flyout

route_change_closes_flyout.details: Navigating to Loyalty Program page closes the open flyout

tests: test_flyout_opens_to_right: PASS - Services flyout at x=288px
test_click_outside_closes: PASS - Flyout closed when clicking main
test_only_one_flyout: PASS - Dashboards replaced Services flyout
test_admin_config_flyout: PASS - Opens with correct header
test_submenu_navigation: PASS - Hotels link navigates to /services/hotels
test_active_route_highlighted: PASS - Hotels has bg-[#4D96FF]/20 text-white
test_toggle_flyout: PASS - Same trigger closes flyout
test_bottom_positioning_small_viewport: PASS - Uses bottom: 183px; top: auto
test_route_change_closes_flyout: PASS - Flyout closed on navigation
